No Poverty.reason: The course focuses on international finance and macroeconomics, with no explicit mention or direct evidence linking to poverty eradication or social protection systems.

Zero Hunger.reason: No evidence in the course description or objectives relates to food security, agriculture, or nutrition.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No evidence in the course description or objectives relates to health, well-being, or disease prevention.

Quality Education.reason: The course explicitly aims to develop 'Professional Economic analysis' and 'International Perspective and Competitiveness' skills, aligning with Target 4.4 on relevant skills for employment.
evidence: 經濟專業分析能力(Ability of Professional Economic analysis)
國際視野與國際競爭力(International Perspective and Competitiveness)
學習研判國際金融演變及政策走向的分析能力

Gender Equality.reason: No evidence in the course description or objectives relates to gender equality or women's empowerment.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No evidence in the course description or objectives relates to water, sanitation, or pollution.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No evidence in the course description or objectives relates to energy access, renewable energy, or energy efficiency.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course directly addresses international finance trends, industrial competitiveness, and macroeconomic adjustments, which are central to sustaining economic growth (Target 8.1, 8.2) and understanding financial markets (Target 8.10).
evidence: 匯率波動與產業競爭力之關聯

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course explicitly examines 'exchange rate volatility and industrial competitiveness' and its impact on enterprises, directly supporting industrial development (Targets 9.2, 9.3).
evidence: 匯率波動與產業競爭力之關聯
匯率對進出口企業的影響
市場取價與產業競爭力的角色

Reduced Inequalities.reason: Analysis of the 'Global monetary new order' and 'international balance of payments imbalances' directly relates to regulating global financial markets (Target 10.5) and addressing international economic inequalities.
evidence: 國際收支失衡之後果與解決方案

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No evidence in the course description or objectives relates to urban development, housing, or community planning.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No explicit evidence in the course description relates to sustainable consumption, production patterns, or waste management.

Climate Action.reason: No evidence in the course description or objectives relates to climate change, mitigation, or adaptation.

Life Below Water.reason: No evidence in the course description or objectives relates to marine ecosystems or ocean health.

Life on Land.reason: No evidence in the course description or objectives relates to terrestrial ecosystems, biodiversity, or land degradation.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: Discussion of the 'Global monetary new order' and 'international trade conflicts' implies the need for effective global governance and institutions (Targets 16.6, 16.8).
evidence: 主管機關的考量和舉措

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course's focus on 'international balance of payments imbalances,' 'macroeconomic adjustments,' and 'international trade conflicts/coordination' directly addresses global macroeconomic stability and policy coherence (Targets 17.13, 17.14).
evidence: 國際收支失衡之後果與解決方案
